name: Gates of Hell Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a heavy skillet.
2. Cube the meats into 1/4 inch cubes and cook in the olive oil with the onions, garlic, salt, and black pepper until browned.
3. In a large stock pot, bring the beer to a boil.
4. Add the meat mixture, tomato sauce, tomatoes, bell pepper, allspice, cumin, chili powder, soy sauce, and whiskey.
5. Reduce heat to medium and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Stir in the dried peppers, Tabasco sauce, and tomato paste.
7. Sprinkle salt to taste.
8. Add the remaining cumin and stir well.
9. Cover and cook for 1 hour, stirring every 10 minutes.
10. Serve hot! This recipe makes enough for 12-20 people depending upon their appetites. It is delicious served over white rice or just by itself.
